channel.title: Tech Insights
channel.description: Daily curated news on AI, developer tools, and the tech industry

item.title: Why I forked career-ops and shut down the tool I built

item.title: AI Agent Memory: How It Works and When You Actually Need It
item.description: Dario Amodei recently said continual learning "will turn out to be not as difficult as it seems" and "will fall to scale plus a slightly different way of thinking." Sholto Douglas at Anthropic...

item.title: Service Workers : Understand in 3 Minutes
item.description: Problem Statement A Service Worker is a script that runs in the background of your web browser, separate from your web page, acting as a programmable network proxy. You hit this problem when you...

item.title: The flat-fee era is over. How to control your AI agent costs in 2026.
item.description: The flat-fee era is over. How to control your AI agent costs in 2026. Anthropic just shifted enterprise billing from flat-fee to per-token. Every major provider is expected to follow within six...

item.title: The Complete Guide to PostgreSQL SQL Query Analysis & Optimization
item.description: Most PostgreSQL performance work is wasted because it starts from the wrong end. Someone notices a slow query, skim-reads EXPLAIN, pattern-matches to "missing index," adds one, and moves on....

item.title: Audit Logging Looked Like a Weekend Project. It Took Us 3 Months.
item.description: When our PM dropped the ticket into the sprint, it said "Add audit logging for user actions. Estimated: 3 story points." Three story points. That's like, a day and a half of work. Create an...

item.title: What AI-native startups actually look like in 2026 (and I'm running one from Tennessee)
item.description: What AI-native startups actually look like in 2026 (and I'm running one from Tennessee) Flatiron Health visited AI-native startups in SF for a month. Their findings: Claude Code replacing Cursor...

item.title: Grab a ticket today: The first StrictlyVC of 2026 kicks off in just a week in San Francisco
item.description: StrictlyVC San Francisco is in just a week. Now’s the time to grab yourself a ticket. Join VCs and founders at Sentro Filipino Cultural Center on April 30.

item.title: Shipping uptime monitoring to an existing cron product: the decisions I got wrong first
item.description: Quick context: I am Samed, founder of Drumbeats — started as a cron and background-job monitoring service, now also does HTTP uptime. This post is the build log of adding uptime monitoring on top...

item.title: AI galaxy hunters are adding to the global GPU crunch
item.description: Astronomers are turning to GPUs to find needles in the galactic haystack.

item.description: This is today’s edition of The Download, our weekday newsletter that provides a daily dose of what’s going on in the world of technology. Introducing: the Nature issue When we talk about “nature,”...

item.description: Imagine a world where hackers don't sleep, don't take breaks, and find weak spots in your systems instantly. Well, that world is already here. Thanks to AI, attackers are now launching automated,...

item.title: Beehiiv rolls out new creator tools, including webinars and customizable paywalls
item.description: Beehiiv is clearly done being just a newsletter platform based on today's launch of a new webinar feature, customizable paywalls, and more.

item.title: Tim Cook’s departure is the start of a new era at Apple
item.description: Apple is about to become a very different company. This September, Apple CEO Tim Cook is stepping down and will be replaced by John Ternus, the current head of hardware. But the shift is bigger...

item.title: Govee’s new colorful outdoor lights are its first with solar power
item.description: Govee announced its first solar-powered lights today. They include a 6W panel with an integrated 4,800mAh battery that can be recharged with a single full day of sunlight (though if the weather's...

item.title: Microsoft launches ‘vibe working’ in Word, Excel, and PowerPoint
item.description: Microsoft is rolling out a new Agent Mode inside Office apps like Word, Excel, and PowerPoint this week. Previously described by Microsoft as "vibe working," the Agent Mode is a more powerful...

item.title: Project Glasswing Proved AI Can Find the Bugs. Who's Going to Fix Them?

item.title: FBI Extracts Deleted Signal Messages from iPhone Notification Database
item.description: 404 Media reports (alternate site): The FBI was able to forensically extract copies of incoming Signal messages from a defendant’s iPhone, even after the app was deleted, because copies of the...

item.title: Will fusion power get cheap? Don’t count on it.
item.description: Fusion power could provide a steady, zero-emissions source of electricity in the future—if companies can get plants built and running. But a new study suggests that even if that future arrives, it...

item.title: China-Linked GopherWhisper Infects 12 Mongolian Government Systems with Go Backdoors
item.description: Mongolian governmental institutions have emerged as the target of a previously undocumented China-aligned advanced persistent threat (APT) group tracked as GopherWhisper. "The group wields a wide...

item.description: Vercel on Wednesday revealed that it has identified an additional set of customer accounts that were compromised as part of a security incident that enabled unauthorized access to its internal...

item.title: Apple Fixes iOS Flaw That Let FBI Recover Deleted Signal Messages
item.description: Apple has rolled out a software fix for iOS and iPadOS to address a Notification Services flaw that stored notifications marked for deletion on the device. The vulnerability, tracked as...

item.title: Honor’s new phones look like iPhones for Android
item.description: Honor has announced the 600 and 600 Pro, which it calls "accessible flagships," and they look… familiar. Especially in that orange. The Pro makes the iPhone comparison especially obvious thanks to...

item.title: India’s app market is booming — but global platforms are capturing most of the gains
item.description: Non-gaming apps, led by streaming and AI, are driving growth, even as India's spending per user lags global peers.

item.title: The Iranian women Trump ‘saved’ from execution are simultaneously real and AI-manipulated
item.description: On Wednesday, President Donald Trump claimed to have secured the release of eight Iranian women condemned to execution for protesting the regime. Only the night before, he had posted on Truth...
